widget.name: Send lead to sheet
widget.description: Adds a button to the lead card that sends the lead's data to a Google Sheet on click
widget.short_description: Send lead to Google Sheet on click
widget.tour_description: The widget adds a button to the lead card. Clicking it instantly sends all lead data to your Google Sheet.

settings.generate_endpoint_url: Document generation API endpoint URL, e.g. https://alladin-sheets-module.vercel.app/api/generate-docs
